category_sources: source_facts.description says ROOT analyzes petabytes of data scientifically; official ROOT manual describes ROOT as an object-oriented framework for big data processing, statistical analysis, visualization, and storage in high-energy physics.
display_name_sources: Official root.cern site and root-project GitHub organization identify the software as ROOT; source_facts.name is root.
docs_sources: Official ROOT Manual and Reference Documentation are dedicated documentation surfaces under root.cern.
repo_sources: Official root-project GitHub organization identifies root-project/root as the official repository for ROOT; GitHub README also points to root.cern.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, official ROOT manual, and official reference documentation describe scientific data analysis, storage, visualization, and C++ framework usage.
